name: pokecompanion
description: Monorepo do PokéCompanion (backend + web) — script único para subir tudo em dev.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix web"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix web
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix web
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run migrate --prefix backend && npm run seed --prefix backend
